description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Dinit Meson based CI that runs on pushes to master, when a pull request with the 'meson' label is opened, labeled, reopened, or synchronized, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have three jobs: Debian-bookworm_build, MacOS-latest_build, and Alpine-latest_build, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest with Debian Bookworm, macos-latest, and ubuntu-latest with Alpine), and executing meson setup, build, unit tests, and integration tests in a matrix of architectures.
